form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Most recently finished last in a Grade 4 on April 6 over 390m at this track behind Our Regards beaten 14 lengths (23.19). Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 8 length third (22.39) over 390m at this track. Holds top-three claims.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.63) when seventh over 400m at Warragul in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 450m. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.40) over 390m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 1.2 lengths second but did run a slick 22.18 over the 390m trip. Rates on top here on the time from last run.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a one length second at this track but did record a handy 22.23 over the 390m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 10 lengths (22.70) behind Paw Estrella in a Mix 3/4 on April 8. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 390m. Last start finished 7th over 390m at this track beaten 11 lengths (22.61) behind Ripped Paige in a Grade 5 FIN on April 6. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fourth (22.78) in a GR 5 at Gosford and returns after a six months break. Looks a key runner while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on rounding the turn out of the back straight and lost some ground.
